batch_1.rationale: Independent foundational work (component signal + test locator)

batch_2.rationale: Parallel work streams (UI template + test harness) with no shared dependencies

batch_3.rationale: Sequential; depends on T4 test harness completion

batch_4.rationale: Final validation gate; depends on all implementation tasks

critical_path_rationale: T3→T4→T5→T6 (length 4) is the longest chain; determines minimum completion time

medium_risk_items.risk_reason: ManifestStore API discovery; computed signal pattern understanding
medium_risk_items.mitigation: Placed in Batch 1 for early validation

medium_risk_items.risk_reason: Cypress test harness pattern compliance; assertion implementation
medium_risk_items.mitigation: Placed in Batch 2 for early pattern validation

medium_risk_items.risk_reason: Cypress spec syntax; test harness integration
medium_risk_items.mitigation: Depends on T4 completion; validates test pattern early

low_risk_items.risk_reason: Straightforward locator addition following existing pattern
Template modification; straightforward HTML element addition

blockers_analysis: No execution blockers identified. All context (story, constraints) is complete and clear. Schedule is executable as-is.

dependency_validation.validation_details: Dependency matrix validated; no cycles found. All dependent tasks scheduled after their prerequisites complete.

parallelization_safety.batch_1_rationale: T1 (manifest-header.component.ts) and T3 (manifestCreateEdit.locators.ts) have no shared file modifications
parallelization_safety.batch_2_rationale: T2 (manifest-header.component.html) and T4 (manifest-header.component.test-harness.ts) target different layers (UI vs. testing)
parallelization_safety.shared_file_analysis: No shared file modifications across parallel tasks. Merge conflict risk is low.

confidence_rationale: High confidence due to complete story specification and clear constraints. Score reduced from 9 to 8 due to assumptions on file paths (test harness location, Cypress spec location) which are not verified against actual codebase.
knowledge_gaps: Exact file path of manifest-header Cypress spec (assumed but not verified)
Whether PrimeNG Badge module is already imported in manifest-header module (inferred but not verified)
Specific signature of existing ManifestStore API (inferred from constraints; actual API may differ slightly)
assumptions_documented: tasks.yaml was not provided in initial artifact set; inferred from story.yaml and constraints.md
manifestStore is available to component via dependency injection
Test harness and locator patterns exist in codebase following established conventions
PrimeNG Badge component is available in manifest-header module scope
notes: Schedule is optimized for parallelization and de-risking. High-medium risk tasks (T1, T4) are scheduled early to fail fast. Two parallel work streams (component implementation T1→T2 and test infrastructure T3→T4→T5) are coordinated to minimize critical path from 6 sequential batches to 4 total batches.

metacognitive_context.decision_rationale: Assignment schedule prioritizes: (1) de-risking by front-loading medium-risk discovery tasks, (2) parallelization of independent work streams, (3) dependency respect. Batching strategy reduces critical path while maintaining safety.
metacognitive_context.execution_protocol_applied: execution-discipline skill protocol followed in full. Artifact I/O, dependency analysis, risk assessment, and compliance documentation completed.
